summary: Bug fix verification for 'stuck on Building dashboard' — Bearer token via localStorage (aos_token) is now correctly set on login and attached via axios interceptor. Full end-to-end frontend verification passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Token stored in localStorage (XSS risk). httpOnly cookie fallback still works server-side; consider preferring cookie auth in production and using localStorage only as fallback.
AuthContext relies solely on token presence to trigger /auth/me; if token is expired the user briefly sees a flash before being redirected — acceptable but could show a loader.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bearer token fix verified. localStorage key is 'aos_token'. Excel downloads use same axios instance so also carry the header.
rca of the issue: Previous flow relied on httpOnly cookie which the browser did not send on cross-origin API calls in the user's environment → /api/dashboard returned 401 → Dashboard.jsx never resolved its loading state and stayed on 'Building dashboard'. Fix: login/register responses include a JWT; frontend stores it in localStorage['aos_token'] and axios request interceptor adds `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Backend get_current_user already supports Bearer fallback.
